subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Let $X$ denote the length of time (in minutes) of using a computer at a public library with pdf given by $f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{5}e^{-x/5} & \text{if } x \ge 0 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ (a) What is the probability of using a computer for more than 10 minutes. (b) Find the probability of using a computer between 5 and 10 minutes. (c) Find the cumulative distribution function of $X$.
